arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta fumes at Arsenal players in awkward interview after Liverpool draw
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta cut a frustrated figure during his post-match interview as bemoaned his Arsenal players in the first-half of their draw at Liverpool as they conceded two quick goals

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta ‘really upset’ before Arsenal hit back to draw at Liverpool
arts.sum: The Gunners trailed the champions 2-0 at half-time at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Arsenal showed Mikel Arteta exactly what he wanted to see after Liverpool taunts
arts.sum: LIVERPOOL 2-2 ARSENAL: The newly minted Premier League champions were in danger of piling even more misery onto Mikel Arteta's side before a rousing second half fightback

arts.ttl: Arsenal could start three emergency attackers against Newcastle after double blow in Liverpool draw
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta faces the prospect of a double attacking blow for next weekend's clash with Newcastle United after Sunday's 2-2 draw with Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star David Raya produces classy gesture following Liverpool's title victory
arts.sum: Arsenal were beaten to the Premier League title by Liverpool recently but David Raya took time to congratulate fellow goalkeeper Alisson before their clash at Anfield

arts.ttl: Liverpool 2-2 Arsenal: 3 talking points as questions raised over Gunners' discipline

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold booed as Liverpool squander two-goal lead against Arsenal
arts.sum: The hosts led 2-0 in Sunday’s Premier League clash but the Gunners hit back and ended the game with 10 men.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 2–2 Arsenal: Player Ratings as Visitors Rescue Point Against Champions
arts.sum: Liverpool looked hungrier in the first half, but Arsenal clawed back two goals to rescue a point in their trip to Anfield.

arts.ttl: Arsenal give Liverpool 'deserved' guard of honour
arts.sum: Arsenal made good on a promise from manager Mikel Arteta by giving Premier League champions Liverpool a guard of honour before Sunday's game at Anfield.
